untranslatable_reason: The Advance Block pattern is a specific three-candle candlestick formation requiring detection of individual candle relationships (three consecutive candles with specific high/low properties and body sizes). This requires pattern recognition logic not available in the allowed indicator set. The conditions provided approximate trend context but cannot precisely identify the three-candle Advance Block pattern itself.
translation_notes: Approximated using trend indicators: downtrend confirmation (ADX > 25 + close above sma_20), upward retracement signal (close < sma_10 suggesting pullback within downtrend), and reversal exit when uptrend resumes. True Advance Block pattern detection requires candle pattern recognition beyond available indicators.
